articles.title: HSBC WPB Launches AI-Powered Wealth Advisory Platform
articles.summary: HSBC WPB has launched an AI-powered wealth advisory tool for APAC private banking clients. The system provides real-time portfolio insights and personalised recommendations.

articles.title: DBS Bank Accelerates Agile Transformation Across Wealth Unit
articles.summary: DBS Bank is expanding its agile delivery model into its wealth management division, targeting 30% faster product launches.

talking_points.headline: HSBC WPB's AI platform sets new benchmark for APAC wealth advisory
talking_points.why_it_matters: This directly impacts your AI-enabled change agenda across APAC private banking.
bullets: Jane Smith, Head of WPB Asia announced the rollout at the Singapore FinTech Festival.
The platform uses Claude-based LLMs to deliver hyper-personalised portfolio insights.
Competitor DBS is watching closely — first-mover advantage window is narrow.

talking_points.headline: HSBC WPB AI platform signals new era in COO operational strategy
talking_points.why_it_matters: As COO you will need to govern the cost, risk, and change programme behind this launch.
bullets: Initial rollout covers HK, Singapore, and Australia — 3 of your largest change programmes.
Regulatory sign-off took 14 weeks — governance model is reusable across markets.
Jane Smith, Head of WPB Asia has requested COO input on the global rollout plan.
